msg: primed, standing by; inbox watcher armed; awaiting GO

WI-742 orphan disposition ruling needed before dispatch: .claude/skills/my/e2e-infra.md is a reverse-orphan (no source under .agents/skills/). DELETE (default) vs PROMOTE to a real .agents/skills/ master. Holding WI-742 dispatch until ruled.

WI-744/745/746 skill-content review gate: keep human-review-of-content-before-merge (default, per charter skill-building is human-led) vs relax. Default honored unless ruled otherwise: I will take these executors through plan+author+green-PR but HOLD the merge for human content review rather than auto-merging on green.

Docs-only PRs cannot merge — pre-existing infra drift outside all WI scopes. Branch protection on main requires the 'main' check (a ci.yml job), but ci.yml has pull_request paths-ignore for **.md/docs/**/.claude/**, so it never runs on docs-only PRs and the required 'main' context never reports -> mergeStateStatus=BLOCKED. Hits WI-741 (#1171, green, NON-gated), WI-744 (#1174), WI-745 (#1170), WI-746 (#1173) — all pure .md/.claude changes. WI-743 (#1172, touches .github/) and WI-742 (touches scripts/sync-skills.mjs) are exempt and CAN merge. Options: (a) capture a new WI applying the AGENTS.md workflow-trigger-drift remedy to ci.yml/'main' (a PR-only pass-through job reporting the required name when ci.yml legitimately skips on docs); (b) operator admin-merges the 4 docs PRs (enforce_admins=off allows it); (c) point me at a sanctioned existing docs-PR merge path. RECOMMEND (a). Holding the 4 docs-PR merges pending ruling; WI-743 rework (Codex P1) and WI-742 (once orphan ruling lands) proceed independently.

Adjudicated WI-743 Codex P1 (real-smoke hard gate) as NOT actionable now; reversed my earlier agreement on new evidence. The real Playwright smoke structurally cannot pass in CI: DOPPLER_TOKEN_STG is not provisioned as a GHA secret (workflow guard + memory project_playwright_e2e_setup), so auth.setup seeding 403s/times-out. A hard gate on it would permanently block ALL web-surface PRs repo-wide. Directed executor to implement the WI-743 AC as written ('real smoke registered optional-only'): required Playwright web smoke = honest documented pass-through; real smoke runs ADVISORY/optional (visible-red to reviewers, non-blocking). F-151 dead-injection-branch deletion stays. Codex thread to be re-disposed REJECT with this rationale. FOLLOW-UP (not WI-743 scope): provision DOPPLER_TOKEN_STG as a GHA secret + stabilize the web smoke so it can later be promoted to a hard gate (ties to the existing pre-launch GitHub-secrets action item) — recommend a capture.

resolved: orphan PROMOTE per ruling prg14-in-002. Dispatching WI-742 executor to promote .claude/skills/my/e2e-infra.md -> a proper .agents/skills master, reconcile vs the OS-aware /e2e skill (drop superseded), add sync-skills --report-orphans guard, fix the AGENTS.md F-041 cite (symbol-based). WI-742 touches scripts/sync-skills.mjs so ci.yml/main runs -> NOT docs-PR-blocked; mergeable on green (not content-review-held).

resolved: KEEP human-review-of-content for WI-744/745/746 per ruling prg14-in-003 (my default ratified). The 3 skill PRs stay merge-held for operator content review; also blocked by prg14-003. Per prg14-in-004 I am holding all 4 docs-PR merges (WI-741/744/745/746) and will NOT alter branch protection or ci.yml triggers autonomously — that fix is operator-owned (Jorn).

resolved: gate fix landed (d790e04eb — ci.yml now runs on docs/.claude PRs) per prg14-in-005. Updating the 4 docs PR branches (WI-741 #1171, WI-744 #1174, WI-745 #1170, WI-746 #1173) via gh pr update-branch to re-trigger CI; will merge each on green. prg14-002 content-review gate CLEARED by operator — WI-744/745/746 merge as-is, NO rework (lean-pointer rework deferred to Stream 2). WI-743+WI-742 already Closed. Goal: graduate the lane.

All 4 docs PRs MERGED per directive after the gate fix: WI-744 #1174 (121371b3), WI-746 #1173 (a35df5b3), WI-745 #1170 (afb0ddd7), WI-741 #1171 (2d76ed08); required main check now reports, all green. Executors running /cosmo:execute complete -> Reviewing. Deferred to Stream 2 skill rework per your 'merge as-is, no rework' ruling: 3 unresolved Codex P2 content-accuracy findings — tech/eduagent-db (#1170): (a) SECURITY-ADJACENT false claim that write-ownership scoping is lint-enforced (eslint has no such rule) + (b) a TOCTOU-prone child-write example; tech/gha-hardening (#1173): eval-live labeled-PR-code inventory accuracy. Flagging (a) for awareness — if you want it fixed sooner than Stream 2, say so. Lane now: WI-743/742 Closed, 4 in Reviewing.

LANE GRADUATED — all 6 WIs Closed/Done: WI-741 (skill-desc hygiene+hook), WI-742 (sync-skills orphan guard+promote+cite), WI-743 (CI hardening F-151/F-157 + regression guard), WI-744 (tech-eduagent-schemas), WI-745 (tech-eduagent-db), WI-746 (tech/gha-hardening ext). Carry-forwards for Stream 2 / operator: (1) Stream 2 skill lean-pointer rework should also fix the 3 deferred Codex P2 content items logged in prg14-008 (tech-eduagent-db false 'lint-enforced' claim [security-adjacent] + TOCTOU example; tech/gha-hardening eval-live inventory); (2) cosmo hygiene: WI-743 has no Project relation; (3) leftover .worktrees/WI-* are prunable. PRG-14/WS-17 COMPLETE.

resolved: prg14-008 content findings (a)+(b) fixed directly by orchestrator on main (commit 25ed39a20, no reopen) — tech-eduagent-db false lint-enforced claim corrected (review-enforced; G1/G5=route-service boundaries) and TOCTOU example replaced with inline EXISTS-subquery ownership + locked-tx alternative. Stream 2 carry-forward narrows to (c) gha-hardening eval-inventory nit only. Lane fully done; standing down.
